title: That LastPass or Bitwarden Security Email May Be a Scam
summary: The messages come from hello[at]lastpassnewsletter[.]com with the subject line "Action Required: Review Updated LastPass Security Policies." In the email body, attackers outlined supposed changes to LastPass security monitoring and reporting protocols and noted that users "have 14 business days to review and…
